---
id: listchats
title: "Retrieves all saved Chats"
description: "Retrieves all the saved Chats between Glean Assistant and the user. The returned Chats contain only metadata and no conversational content."
sidebar_label: "Retrieves all saved Chats"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/chat/glean-api-chat
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves all saved Chats"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/listchats"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves all the saved Chats between Glean Assistant and the user. The returned Chats contain only metadata and no conversational content.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
